# Rule: street_address
# Category: identity
# Jurisdiction: global
#
# Keeps the leading house number and the recognised trailing street
# type; masks the street-name body; falls back to same-length mask when
# neither signal is present. Example: 42 Wallaby Way → 42 ******* Way.

42 Wallaby Way	42 ******* Way
